observations.summary: Dan encounters various travelers but consistently avoids engagement, keeping his head down and expression neutral, contrasting with the active presence of others around him.

left_evidence.quote: He passed other travelers on the road—merchants with donkeys laden with goods, a family moving from one village to another, a pair of Roman soldiers who gave him a hard look but didn't stop him.

right_evidence.quote: Each time, Dan kept his head down, his pace steady, his expression neutral.
